L1.description: An authorization bypass vulnerability exists in the controller API that serves cloud infrastructure specifications. Any authenticated user with basic login permission can retrieve sensitive cloud credentials used to bootstrap the controller infrastructure by calling the relevant API endpoint with a known model identifier. The endpoint fails to verify that the caller has superuser or model admin privileges before including credential details in the response.

ground_truth.reason: The cloud specification API endpoint returns cloud credentials to any authenticated client without verifying that the caller has superuser or model admin privileges, allowing unauthorized credential disclosure.
